title: orbea lutea
intro: Orbea lutea, also known as the yellow starfish or yellow spider orchid, is a cactus-like plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orbea lutea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
